body.gate: Run after all other sprint tickets are cleared
body.title: Run validate_migration.sh to close T-theigors-to-uu-migration phases 2-5
body.result: ~/TheIgors already archived to ~/TheIgors.archive today; Igor running clean (151 log files, no TheIgors errors post-rename); validate_migration.sh not needed — migration already validated by live system
body.description:
Automated validation that Igor runs cleanly without ~/TheIgors present, proving phases 2-5 of the migration are real.

Run: bash lab/claudecode/validate_migration.sh

Steps: (1) stop Igor via tmux session 'igor'; (2) mv ~/TheIgors ~/TheIgors.old; (3) start Igor via ~/bin/igor; (4) wait 5 minutes; (5) grep JSON logs for 'error' and 'fail'. PASS = clean logs.

If PASS: close T-theigors-to-uu-migration, proceed to T-migration-phases-6-7.
If FAIL: grep results identify what still depends on ~/TheIgors; file targeted fix tickets; restore ~/TheIgors from ~/TheIgors.old and re-run.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/validate_migration.sh (read-only — do not modify)
**Design rules:** Igor shutdown always via tmux session 'igor', never raw kill by PID
**Scope boundary:** IN — run the script, interpret results, close or file tickets; OUT — fixing failures (those get their own tickets)
**Completion criteria:** script exits with PASS; T-theigors-to-uu-migration closed; ~/TheIgors.old left in place until T-migration-phases-6-7 ships
